zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich von Virneburg於1217年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫維爾包格時，他的父親Hermann III. von Virneburg32歲，母親Liutgardis von Nassau45歲。他於大約1250年與Ponchetta von Oberstein在德國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年在海因里希_海普洛文次阿德瑙利爾斯塔爾享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich von Virneburg于1217年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫維爾包格时，他的父亲Hermann III. von Virneburg32岁，母亲Liutgardis von Nassau45岁。他于大约1250年与Ponchetta von Oberstein在德国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1289年在海因里希_海普洛文次阿德瑙利爾斯塔爾享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich von Virneburg was born in 1217, in Virneburg, Mayen-Koblenz, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Hermann III. von Virneburg, was 32 and his mother, Liutgardis von Nassau, was 45. He married Ponchetta von Oberstein about 1250, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1289, in Lierstall, Adenau, Rhineland, Prussia, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich von Virneburg est né en 1217, à Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Hermann III. von Virneburg, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Liutgardis von Nassau, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Ponchetta von Oberstein environ 1250, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1289, à Lierstall, Adenau, Rhénanie, Prusse, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich von Virneburg 1217 in Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hermann III. von Virneburg 32 und seine Mutter Liutgardis von Nassau 45. Er hat um 1250 in Deutschland Ponchetta von Oberstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1289 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Lierstall, Adenau, Rheinprovinz, Preußen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Virneburg è nato il nel 1217 nel Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Hermann III. von Virneburg, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Liutgardis von Nassau, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Ponchetta von Oberstein circa 1250, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1289, nel Lierstall, Adenau, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Virneburgが1217年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス メイエン-コブレンズバーネブルグで生まれた時，父Hermann III. von Virneburgは32歳，母Liutgardis von Nassauは45歳であった。約1250年にドイツでPonchetta von Obersteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズアデナウリールスタルで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Virneburg(이)가 1217년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 메이-코블렌즈 버니버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hermann III. von Virneburg(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Liutgardis von Nassau(은)는 45세였다. 그는 대략 1250년 독일에서 Ponchetta von Oberstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 아데나 리어스탤에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Virneburg nasceu em 1217, em Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Hermann III. von Virneburg, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Liutgardis von Nassau, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Ponchetta von Oberstein aproximadamente 1250, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1289, em Lierstall, Adenau, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich von Virneburg родился в 1217 г. в местности вирнебург, ландкрис меиен-кобленц, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Hermann III. von Virneburg было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Liutgardis von Nassau, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Ponchetta von Oberstein около 1250 г. в местности Германия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1289 г. в местности лиирсталл, аденау, раинпровинз, Пруссия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich von Virneburg nació en 1217, en Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Hermann III. von Virneburg, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Liutgardis von Nassau, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Ponchetta von Oberstein aproximadamente 1250, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1289, en Lierstall, Adenau, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, a la edad de 72 años.
